---
title: "World Football R"
subtitle: "Analysis of European football statistics with R"
categories: [R, Sport, ggplot2]
date: 2026-04-25
---

## Overview

Analysis of European football leagues using the `worldfootballR` package. Data covers top 5 leagues — Premier League, Ligue 1, Bundesliga, Serie A, La Liga.

## Load data

​\`\`\`{r} #\| message: false #\| warning: false

library(tidyverse) library(worldfootballR)

# Example : top scorers Ligue 1 2024

ligue1 \<- fb_league_stats( country = "FRA", gender = "M", season_end_year = 2024, tier = "1st", stat_type = "shooting" )

```         

## Visualisation

​```{r}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

ligue1 |>
  slice_max(Gls, n = 15) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Player, Gls), y = Gls)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0F6E56") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 15 scorers — Ligue 1 2024",
    x = NULL, y = "Goals"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
